title: Stop AI Hallucinations With These 5 Techniques
summary: A video tutorial presents five techniques to reduce hallucinations in AI agents: semantic tool selection to filter context, graph RAG for precise queries, multi-agent validation for verification, symbolic guardrails enforced in code, and runtime steering for self-correction. Demos use Strands Agents framework on a travel agent application with measurable token savings and failure prevention.
